metadata.scheme_name: Private Tuition Assistance to Socially and Educationally Backward Class Students Studying in Science Stream of Class 11 & 12

raw_data.details: The "Private Tuition Assistance to Socially and Educationally Backward Class Students Studying in Science Stream of Class 11 & 12" scheme was launched by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance for private tuition to socially and educationally backward class (SEBC) students pursuing science education in higher secondary classes. Under this scheme, a total of ₹15,000 is granted to each class of 11th and 12th to cover private tuition fees.
raw_data.benefits: Financial assistance of ₹15,000 for Class 11thFinancial assistance of ₹15,000 for Class 12th
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant must be a permanent resident of Gujarat. The applicant must belong to the Socially and Educationally Backward Class (SEBC). The applicant must be studying in the science stream in Class 11th or Class 12th in a recognized higher secondary school. The applicant must be availing of private tuition during the academic year. The applicant’s annual family income must not exceed ₹6,00,000.
raw_data.application_process:
OnlineApplication Process:
Step 1: The applicant may visit the Digital Gujarat Portal: [https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/)
Step 2: On the home page, click on ‘Register’ and the applicant will be redirected to the registration form page.
Step 3: Enter your Mobile Number, Email, Set Password, and then click on ‘Save’.
Step 4: After successful registration, the applicant can login through his/her User Name (Mobile No./Email ID) and Password.
Step 5: Now, click on ‘My Profile’ to update your profile and fill in all the mandatory information.
Step 6: After filling in profile details, click on ‘Update Profile’. The profile will be updated after entering the verification Code (OTP).
Step 7: Now under services, select ‘Scholarship Services’ and then click on ‘SC Scheme’.
Step 8: Select the Financial Year for which you want to apply for and then click on ‘Change Financial Year’.
Step 9: Select the scheme, read the interaction carefully, and then click on ‘Continue to Service’.
Step 10: Fill in the application form completely and upload all the relevant documents.
Step 11: Now, click on ‘Save as Draft’ and agree with the terms & conditions, and submit the application form by clicking on ‘Confirm & Final Submit’. Instructions: Note 1: Photo uploading for all applicants is mandatory. Note 2: Application will be considered complete only when all sections are completed. Note 3: Only one application per applicant will be acceptable for a scholarship. If any student submits more than one application either from a single institute or from multiple institutions his/her all applications will be rejected by the competent authority and no request from any side will be entertained. Note 4: In case of any wrong/misleading information provided in the application shall lead to rejection of the application by Department Authorities. Note 5: All required documents must be carefully scanned as per the instructions given. Note 6: The student has to fill his/her application carefully as there is no provision for institution change once the application is submitted successfully. Note 7: The unreadable uploaded documents will allow the competent authority to reject the student application. Note 8: Direct Individual submission of this application form will not be accepted in case of students studying inside the state. Only outside students have to fill out their form online and submit his/her application form to their native district officer.[User Manual](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/loginapp/Download/User_Manual_on_CSP_v1. 1.pdf)- English[User Manual](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/loginapp/Download/GUser_Manual_on_CSP_v1. 1.pdf)- Gujarati
raw_data.documents_required: Bank Passbook/Cancelled ChequeCaste CertificateIncome CertificateOther Marksheets/Last Year Mark sheetReceipt of Fee Paid

Only outside students have to fill out their form online and submit his/her application form to their native district officer.[User Manual](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/loginapp/Download/User_Manual_on_CSP_v1. 1.pdf)- English[User Manual](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/loginapp/Download/GUser_Manual_on_CSP_v1. 1.pdf)- GujaratiDocuments RequiredBank Passbook/Cancelled ChequeCaste CertificateIncome CertificateOther Marksheets/Last Year Mark sheetReceipt of Fee PaidFrequently Asked QuestionsWho is eligible to apply for this scheme? No, the application process is online. How much financial assistance is provided? A total of ₹30,000 is provided - ₹15,000 for Class 11 and ₹15,000 for Class 12. Is there any income limit for the scheme? Yes, the applicant’s annual family income must not exceed ₹6,00,000. Is this scheme available for students from all states? No, this scheme is only for permanent residents of Gujarat. Is the scheme applicable to all educational streams? No, the scheme is specifically for students in the science stream only. Can I apply offline? No, the application process is online. How can a student apply for the scheme? The student must apply online through the Digital Gujarat Portal. Is there any application fee to apply? No, there is no application fee. What documents are required to apply? Bank passbook/cancelled cheque, caste certificate, income certificate, last year’s mark sheet, and private tuition fee receipt are required. Where can I get more information? More details are available on https://sje.gujarat.gov.in/ddcw and the Digital Gujarat portal. Sources And References[Guidelines](https://mariyojana.gujarat.gov.in/Schemeatoz.aspx)OkWas this helpful?
raw_data.scheme_name: Private Tuition Assistance to Socially and Educationally Backward Class Students Studying in Science Stream of Class 11 & 12

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, the application process is online.

faqs.question: How much financial assistance is provided?
faqs.answer: A total of ₹30,000 is provided - ₹15,000 for Class 11 and ₹15,000 for Class 12.

faqs.question: Is there any income limit for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, the applicant’s annual family income must not exceed ₹6,00,000.

faqs.question: Is this scheme available for students from all states?
faqs.answer: No, this scheme is only for permanent residents of Gujarat.

faqs.question: Is the scheme applicable to all educational streams?
faqs.answer: No, the scheme is specifically for students in the science stream only.

faqs.question: Can I apply offline?
faqs.answer: No, the application process is online.

faqs.question: How can a student apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: The student must apply online through the Digital Gujarat Portal.

faqs.question: Is there any application fee to apply?
faqs.answer: No, there is no application fee.

faqs.question: What documents are required to apply?
faqs.answer: Bank passbook/cancelled cheque, caste certificate, income certificate, last year’s mark sheet, and private tuition fee receipt are required.

faqs.question: Where can I get more information?
faqs.answer: More details are available on https://sje.gujarat.gov.in/ddcw and the Digital Gujarat portal.
